name: io.github.jasoncbraatz/fintable-mcp
title: Fintable MCP
description: Unofficial MCP server for fintable.io — manage financial categories, rules, and transactions.

environmentVariables.name: FINTABLE_COOKIES
environmentVariables.description: Full cookie header string from Chrome DevTools for fintable.io authentication. Not needed if using rookiepy auto-extraction.

environmentVariables.name: FINTABLE_SESSION_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Just the fintable_session cookie value (alternative to FINTABLE_COOKIES).
